Law & Motion Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-15-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lonnell Worthy appearing in propria persona 824-2342, moving for arbitration award
No appearance by defendant. The Court took this matter under submission. (JJM/301) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855

Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar May-10-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances. Robert M. Maltz, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF VALERIAN, PATTERSON, FIELD & MCGRAW, (510) 521-0612 appeared on behalf of defendants Joseph and Rosemarie Rodriguez.

Plaintiff and moving party did not appear. Defendant stated that no notice was received by defendants for today's hearing. The plaintiff's motion for reconsideration was denied. Counsel for defendants to prepare order. (JJM) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-07-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- defendants JOSEPH RODIGUEZ and ROSEMARIE RODRIGUEZ' motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. (JJM/MD) LEE BATARA, CSR 3759
